text:
Pearl Locusts 真珠蝗 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Pearl Locusts 真珠蝗 - This is a Pearl Locust in card form. This rare species is best known for the pearl located in its abdomen. They have a distinctive call and they attack in swarms. An outbreak of these creatures occurs once every 12 years or so.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.052 :: 真珠蝗 
腹に真珠を持つ蝗。十数年に１度、大発生する。
|-
![Eng]
|No.052 :: Pearl Locusts 
Locusts with a pearl belly. Once every 10 years, an outbreak will occur.
|}
